creator: ardovm@yahoo.it
text:
Running e2fsck on the md(4)-backed file, after reboot:

# e2fsck /dev/md0s1
e2fsck 1.42.13 (17-May-2015)
/dev/md0s1 was not cleanly unmounted, check forced.

Inode 126977, i_size is 24, should be 1024.  Fix<y>? yes
